title: Swiss Society²
description: A Modpack meant for my Minecraft Server and free to use for others. Comes with a datapack, resource pack, and configs that changes/fixes a multitude of recipes and spawnrates. The successor to Swiss Society.
body:
A Modpack meant for my Minecraft Server and free to use for others. [Consider joining my Server via our discord!](https://discord.gg/Ed9DSPdFM2) Meant to be a successor to my previous modpack, Swiss Society. Comes with a datapack, resource pack, and configs that changes/fixes a multitude of bugs, recipes, and spawnrates. Where Swiss Society was a very big pack with many different mods, Swiss Squared cuts back on a lot of bloat to be more focused and updates the pack to 1.21.1! Some Noteworthy Modpack Content:
Spoiler - There is lots of options for building elborate bases with extra blocks. - Trial Chambers have been adjusted by mods to include additional features plus reuseable vaults. - Fishing has been reworked by the Starcatcher mod. - Waystones and Warp Pipes offer additional quick-travel options. - ComputerCraft, a personal favorite, is included for the more technical players. - Backpacks for carrying all those items found while exploring. - Many extra structures scattered around the world. - Spud's Shops offer ways for servers like mine to implement player trade. - Ports of Alex's Caves & Mobs for 1.21.1. - Reach the Aether Dimension using the Paradise Lost mod. - The Nether and End dimensions have additional features such as extended Nether height and more End biomes. - Create your own modular dimensions with VerseWorks, a new take on the popular MystCraft mod!
Mods Included:
